attributes.style: max-width: 390px; margin: 0px auto; padding: 26px 18px 0px;
margin-bottom: 22px;
font-size: 10.5px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.14em; color: rgb(142, 136, 126); text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 8px;
font-family: Fraunces, serif; font-size: 30px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.025em; line-height: 1.05; margin: 0px; color: rgb(31, 30, 28);
height: 1px; background: rgb(234, 231, 224); margin-bottom: 20px;
display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 28px; padding: 14px 0px; border-top: 1px solid rgb(234, 231, 224); border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(234, 231, 224);
font-family: Fraunces, serif; font-size: 26px; font-weight: 600; color: rgb(31, 30, 28); letter-spacing: -0.02em; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
font-size: 11px; color: rgb(142, 136, 126); letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-top: 2px;
font-family: Fraunces, serif; font-size: 26px; font-weight: 600; color: rgb(31, 30, 28); letter-spacing: -0.02em; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
font-size: 11px; color: rgb(142, 136, 126); letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-top: 2px;

font-size: 11px; color: rgb(142, 136, 126); letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-top: 2px;
display: flex; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 28px; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap;

flex: 1 1 0%; min-width: 200px; border: 1px solid rgb(234, 231, 224); background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 4px; padding: 9px 12px; font-family: inherit; font-size: 13px; color: rgb(31, 30, 28); outline: none;
display: flex; gap: 6px;

background: rgb(31, 30, 28); color: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; border-radius: 4px; padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; font-family: inherit;

background: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(31, 30, 28); border: 1px solid rgb(234, 231, 224); border-radius: 4px; padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; font-family: inherit;

background: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(31, 30, 28); border: 1px solid rgb(234, 231, 224); border-radius: 4px; padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; font-family: inherit;

background: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(31, 30, 28); border: 1px solid rgb(234, 231, 224); border-radius: 4px; padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; font-family: inherit;
margin-bottom: 40px;
display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(234, 231, 224); padding-bottom: 8px;
font-family: Fraunces, serif; font-size: 28px; font-weight: 500; color: rgb(31, 30, 28); letter-spacing: -0.02em;
font-size: 11px; color: rgb(142, 136, 126); letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase;
